title: × hulthemosa hardyi
intro: × Hulthemosa hardyi, also known as Western Yarrow, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its fern-like foliage and white or yellowish flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its essential oil and flavonoids. Western Yarrow is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Western Yarrow include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate a range of health issues, from minor wounds to menstrual cramps.
